name: Swordfish with Mango-Tomatillo Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and minced
2/3 pound swordfish, ground black pepper to taste, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mango, tomatillo, bell pepper, cilantro, and lime juice in a bowl. Set aside.
2. Place the fish on a rack in a baking pan or use a broiler pan. Sprinkle the fish with ground black pepper.
3. Bake in a preheated 450-degree oven for 12 minutes per inch of thickness.
4. Serve with the relish on the side.
